data.SOURCE:
@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'EHO Banka Verisi'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define view entity YEHO_DDL_I_BANK_DATA
  as select from yeho_t_offlinedt inner join yeho_t_bankpass on yeho_t_bankpass.companycode = yeho_t_offlinedt.companycode
                                                            and yeho_t_bankpass.glaccount = yeho_t_offlinedt.glaccount
                                                            and yeho_t_bankpass.currency = yeho_t_offlinedt.currency
                                 left outer join yeho_t_bankcode on yeho_t_bankcode.bank_code = yeho_t_bankpass.bank_code                                            
{
  key yeho_t_offlinedt.companycode                   as Companycode,
  key yeho_t_offlinedt.glaccount                     as Glaccount,
  key yeho_t_offlinedt.receipt_no                    as ReceiptNo,
  key yeho_t_offlinedt.physical_operation_date       as PhysicalOperationDate,
  key yeho_t_offlinedt.currency                      as Currency,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.sequence_no                   as SequenceNo,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.time                          as Time,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.description                   as Description,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.payee_vkn                     as PayeeVkn,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Transactioncurrency'
      yeho_t_offlinedt.current_balance               as CurrentBalance,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.debit_credit                  as DebitCredit,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.debtor_vkn                    as DebtorVkn,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.sender_name                   as SenderName,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.sender_bank                   as SenderBank,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.sender_iban                   as SenderIban,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.sender_branch                 as SenderBranch,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.transaction_type              as TransactionType,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.counter_account_no            as CounterAccountNo,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.contract_no                   as ContractNo,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.company_unique_payment_no     as CompanyUniquePaymentNo,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.accounting_date               as AccountingDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Transactioncurrency'
      yeho_t_offlinedt.amount                        as Amount,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.valor                         as Valor,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.additional_field1             as AdditionalField1,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.additional_field2             as AdditionalField2,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.additional_field3             as AdditionalField3,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.document_type                 as DocumentType,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.exchange_rate                 as ExchangeRate,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.customer                      as Customer,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.supplier                      as Supplier,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.specialglcode                 as Specialglcode,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.operationalglaccount          as Operationalglaccount,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.reconciliationaccount         as Reconciliationaccount,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.taxcode                       as Taxcode,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.transactioncurrency           as Transactioncurrency,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.exchangerate                  as Exchangerate2,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.documentreferenceid           as Documentreferenceid,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.accountingdocumentheadertext  as Accountingdocumentheadertext,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.paymentmethod                 as Paymentmethod,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.paymentterms                  as Paymentterms,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.costcenter                    as Costcenter,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.orderid                       as Orderid,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.profitcenter                  as Profitcenter,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.assignmentreference           as Assignmentreference,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.personnelnumber               as Personnelnumber,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.reference1idbybusinesspartner as Reference1idbybusinesspartner,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.reference2idbybusinesspartner as Reference2idbybusinesspartner,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.reference3idbybusinesspartner as Reference3idbybusinesspartner,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.duecalculationbasedate        as Duecalculationbasedate,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.created_by                    as CreatedBy,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.create_date                   as CreateDate,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.create_time                   as CreateTime,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_account             as ArbitrageAccount,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_currency            as ArbitrageCurrency,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_exchange_type       as ArbitrageExchangeType,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_exchangerate        as ArbitrageExchangerate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'ArbitrageCurrency'
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_amount              as ArbitrageAmount,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_assignmentreference as ArbitrageAssignmentreference,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_item_text           as ArbitrageItemText,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_documentreferenceid as ArbitrageDocumentreferenceid,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_reference1          as ArbitrageReference1,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_reference2          as ArbitrageReference2,
      yeho_t_offlinedt.arbitrage_reference3          as ArbitrageReference3,
      yeho_t_bankpass.bank_code,
      yeho_t_bankcode.bank_name
}
